mnemonics.title: CMMI Levels
mnemonics.content: I Must Develop Quality Outputs (Initial, Managed, Defined, Quantitatively Managed, Optimizing)

acronyms.usage: Used in quality assurance and process optimization

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a circular flowchart with four quadrants labeled Plan, Do, Check, Act

analogies.analogy: Like tuning a car engine: regular adjustments improve performance and prevent breakdowns
